risks: This refresh can be misread as C-011 P1 closure; it only updates evidence routing and local scan coverage.
Inherited P0/P1, S2PLT04, final bundle, independent final command execution, independent signoff, and S2PMT07 acceptance remain blocked.
rollback: Revert S2PAT05 C-011 scan code/tests, user-center scan page, C-011 phase record and manifests, P1 receipt refresh, registry/delivery/event records, and generated status refresh; no runtime production state was changed.
summary: Refreshes C-011 from aggregate Email V1/owner UX evidence into a dedicated scan gate proving legacy B1-B5/five-mail/old English visible-mail identifiers are either absent from active runtime or isolated to filters, tests, history, compatibility, or governance evidence.
test_results: structured parse: JSON 344 OK; JSONL 2 OK; parameter_registry.csv 934 rows width 36; TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.csv 249 rows width 12
